question: What are the ids of high school students who do not have friends?
gold_sql: SELECT id FROM Highschooler EXCEPT SELECT student_id FROM Friend
gold_sql_original: SELECT id FROM Highschooler EXCEPT SELECT student_id FROM Friend
gold_sql_canonical: SELECT id FROM highschooler EXCEPT SELECT student_id FROM friend
agent_sql: SELECT h.ID FROM highschooler AS h WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM friend AS f WHERE f.student_id = h.ID) LIMIT 100
safe_sql: SELECT h.ID FROM highschooler AS h WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM friend AS f WHERE f.student_id = h.ID) LIMIT 100
agent_answer: The IDs of high school students who do not have friends are 1025 and 1641.
